title: euphorbia dulcis var. angulata
intro: Euphorbia dulcis var. angulata, also known as the spiny candy stick or bitter candy stick, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its unique, sweet-tasting stems. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids and triterpenoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Euphorbia dulcis var. angulata are thought to include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is believed to be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
